## 📅 Today's Agenda

⚠️ *Calendar data unavailable — connector requires re-authentication. Please check your Outlook calendar directly for today's meetings.*

## ⚡ Immediate Action

🔑 **Re-authenticate your Microsoft 365 connector.** The Cowork MS365 plugin requires a fresh OAuth login before automated email, Teams, and calendar data can be fetched. Open Cowork → Settings → Connectors and reconnect Microsoft 365. Once done, tomorrow's digest will run fully automatically.
